name: Super Beef Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef, onion and half cup cheese in a bowl.
2. Combine soups and sauce in another bowl.
3. Dip each tortilla in hot oil for a few seconds on each side (microwave can be used to heat them).
4. Place a heaping tablespoon of the beef mixture on each tortilla.
5. Roll up each tortilla tightly, seam side down.
6. Arrange the rolled tortillas in a 13x9 inch baking dish.
7. Pour sauce over the top and sprinkle with the remaining cheese.
8. Bake at 350°F for half an hour.
